title: Better Vanilla Performance
description: This modpack is best vanilla performance and use vanila client mod that help you get more fun Gameplay.
body:
This is Modpack that increase Performance and best Quality.

![ingame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1dfe6a3d170533efbd09f5ac6845f57b2ee4f952_0.webp)

[WARNING][REMINDING]
- Avoid using too many mods or resource packs — this can significantly reduce performance. If the default mod preset is still laggy, try unchecking the mods you don’t need.
- Shaders are optional — feel free to use the ones included and choose your favorite. If a shader causes lag, try adjusting its settings or disable it completely.
- Do NOT disable performance-related mods — these are crucial for keeping the game running smoothly!
